name: Iceland (naval ensign)

colors.symbolism: the Atlantic Ocean and the mountains of Iceland

description: A swallow-tailed version of the Icelandic flag — a blue field with a white-fimbriated red Nordic cross — used as the state ensign and customs/coast-guard flag.
history: The Icelandic state flag (Tjugufáni — 'fork flag') is a swallow-tailed version of the national flag. Used by the Icelandic Coast Guard and Customs Service, and as the official state flag of Iceland.
